name: archetype_warfare_nodejs
description: API REST backend pour le jeu de cartes Archetype Warfare
author: Archetype Warfare Team

scripts.db:disconnect: psql -U postgres -d postgres -c "SELECT pg_terminate_backend(pid) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname = 'archetype_warfare';"
scripts.db:recreate: psql -U postgres -d postgres -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS archetype_warfare;" && psql -U postgres -d postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE archetype_warfare ENCODING 'UTF-8';" && psql -U postgres -d archetype_warfare -f ./config/scripts/recreate.sql
scripts.db:seed: psql -U postgres -d archetype_warfare -f ./docker-init/01-schema.sql && psql -U postgres -d archetype_warfare -f ./docker-init/02-data.sql
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:disconnect && npm run db:recreate && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:recreate:docker: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.db:seed:docker: docker compose exec -T database psql -U admin -d aw -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/01-schema.sql && docker compose exec -T database psql -U admin -d aw -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/02-data.sql
scripts.db:setup:docker: npm run db:recreate:docker && npm run db:seed:docker
scripts.db:restore:docker: docker compose exec -T database psql -U admin -d aw -f /scripts/dump-aw-202510272032.sql
